vi.name: NestJS Roadmap
vi.summary: Backend track để xây API, authentication, database workflows, services, queues và production-ready architecture.

milestones.title: Node.js + TypeScript Foundation
milestones.description: Xây nền với runtime Node.js, async flow, module system, TypeScript types, interfaces, classes và tư duy backend bằng JavaScript hiện đại.

milestones.title: NestJS Core
milestones.description: Đi qua modules, controllers, providers, dependency injection, DTOs và validation để hiểu trục kiến trúc cốt lõi của NestJS.

milestones.title: Database & Prisma
milestones.description: Làm việc với PostgreSQL, Prisma schema, CRUD services, relations và data flow giữa API layer với database layer.

milestones.title: Authentication & Authorization
milestones.description: Thiết kế JWT auth, refresh token flow, guards, roles và access control cho backend có user session rõ ràng hơn.

milestones.title: Production Backend
milestones.description: Chuẩn hóa config, logging, error handling, testing, Swagger và Docker để backend dễ debug, dễ tài liệu hóa và sẵn sàng production hơn.

milestones.title: Advanced Architecture
milestones.description: Mở rộng với queues, caching, WebSocket, microservices và deployment để backend chịu tải tốt hơn, container hóa tốt hơn và linh hoạt hơn khi scale.

outcomes: Có một NestJS roadmap rõ ràng từ foundation tới production architecture.
Đi từ API basics sang database workflows, auth, testing và microservices.
Bám sát các kỹ năng backend thường xuất hiện trong real-world project và interview.
Tạo nền tảng tốt hơn để build production-ready backend bằng TypeScript.

support.title: Phù hợp cho ai?
support.description: Phù hợp với người muốn học backend TypeScript bài bản, từ CRUD API cơ bản tới auth, database, queues và system-level backend concerns.
items: Node.js developer muốn chuyển sang backend có structure tốt hơn với NestJS
Frontend hoặc fullstack developer muốn mở rộng sang API, auth và database workflows
Người cần backend roadmap rõ để vừa build project vừa chuẩn bị interview

en.name: NestJS Roadmap
en.summary: Backend track for building APIs, authentication, database workflows, services, queues, and production-ready architecture.

milestones.title: Node.js + TypeScript Foundation
milestones.description: Build the base with the Node.js runtime, async flow, the module system, TypeScript types, interfaces, classes, and the core backend mindset in modern JavaScript.

milestones.title: NestJS Core
milestones.description: Work through modules, controllers, providers, dependency injection, DTOs, and validation so the core NestJS architecture becomes second nature.

milestones.title: Database & Prisma
milestones.description: Use PostgreSQL, Prisma schema design, CRUD services, relations, and the data flow between your API layer and database layer.

milestones.title: Authentication & Authorization
milestones.description: Design JWT auth, refresh token flows, guards, roles, and access control for backends with clearer user session and permission boundaries.

milestones.title: Production Backend
milestones.description: Standardize config, logging, error handling, testing, Swagger, and Docker so the backend is easier to debug, document, and run in production.

milestones.title: Advanced Architecture
milestones.description: Expand into queues, caching, WebSocket, microservices, and deployment so the backend becomes more scalable, container-friendly, and resilient under real production load.

outcomes: Follow a NestJS roadmap from foundation through production architecture.
Move from API basics into database workflows, auth, testing, and microservices.
Stay close to the backend skills that show up in real-world projects and interviews.
Build a stronger path toward shipping production-ready TypeScript backends.

support.title: Who is this for?
support.description: A strong fit for learners who want a structured TypeScript backend path, from basic CRUD APIs into auth, database workflows, queues, and system-level backend concerns.
items: Node.js developers moving into a more structured NestJS backend stack
Frontend or fullstack developers expanding into APIs, auth, and database workflows
Developers who want a clear backend roadmap for both projects and interview prep

ja.name: NestJS Roadmap
ja.summary: API、authentication、database workflows、services、queues、production-ready architecture を身につけるための backend track です。

milestones.title: Node.js + TypeScript Foundation
milestones.description: Node.js runtime、async flow、module system、TypeScript の types、interfaces、classes を通して backend の土台を固めます。

milestones.title: NestJS Core
milestones.description: modules、controllers、providers、dependency injection、DTOs、validation を通して NestJS の中核構造を理解します。

milestones.title: Database & Prisma
milestones.description: PostgreSQL、Prisma schema、CRUD services、relations、そして API layer と database layer のつながりを学びます。

milestones.title: Authentication & Authorization
milestones.description: JWT auth、refresh token flow、guards、roles、access control を通して user session と権限設計を整理します。

milestones.title: Production Backend
milestones.description: config、logging、error handling、testing、Swagger、Docker を整えて、production backend を運用しやすくします。

milestones.title: Advanced Architecture
milestones.description: queues、caching、WebSocket、microservices、deployment を通して、より scalable で container-friendly な backend に広げます。

outcomes: foundation から production architecture まで進める NestJS roadmap です。
API basics から database workflows、auth、testing、microservices まで順番に学べます。
real-world project と interview に近い backend skill に沿って進められます。
production-ready な TypeScript backend を作る土台を強化できます。

support.title: こんな人におすすめ
support.description: basic CRUD API から auth、database workflows、queues、system-level backend concerns まで、構造的に TypeScript backend を学びたい人に向いています。
items: より structure のある NestJS backend に進みたい Node.js developer
APIs、auth、database workflows まで広げたい frontend / fullstack developer
project と interview prep の両方に使える backend roadmap が欲しい人
